nodes.label: Unit tests for File Operations Service  Tests for the FileOperationsService clas
Small sample binary content for testing.
Ensure the allow-list covers common office/document formats.
File bigger than MAX_FILE_SIZE_BYTES should be rejected.
File at exactly MAX_FILE_SIZE_BYTES should be accepted.
Verify every supported extension is accepted.
If upstream returns non-JSON, result should still succeed.
Expired or invalid token should propagate as 401 from upstream.
Authenticated user without upload permission should propagate as 403.
Downloaded file bigger than MAX_FILE_SIZE_BYTES is rejected.
When Content-Disposition is absent, file_name should be omitted.
Empty Content-Disposition should not produce a file_name.
File at exactly MAX_FILE_SIZE_BYTES should be accepted.
Expired or invalid token should propagate as 401 from upstream.
Authenticated user without file access should propagate as 403.
